text:
reasonable and necessary home health services cannot be provided in the course of a 
single visit, HHA staff or others providing services under arrangements with the HHA 
may remain at the patient's home between visits (e.g., to provide noncovered services). 
However, if all covered services could be provided in the course of one visit, only one 
visit may be covered.
